summary: French portrait painter known for unusual/expressive self-portraits (yawning, pointing at viewer). Painted portrait of Marie Antoinette before her marriage. May have been influenced by Maurice-Quentin de La Tour. Self-portrait pointing at viewer became an Internet meme.

works.name: General
works.description: Known for expressive self-portraits with unusual poses (yawning, pointing). Portrait of Marie Antoinette before her marriage. Claimed to be only student of Maurice-Quentin de La Tour. Self-portrait pointing at viewer is an Internet meme. Made chalk portrait possibly of Toussaint Louverture before dying.

comprehensive_summary:
Joseph Ducreux was a French portrait painter known for his unusual, expressive self-portraits in which he adopted unconventional poses like yawning or pointing at the viewer. His self-portrait pointing at the viewer has become a popular Internet meme.

He painted a portrait of Marie Antoinette before her marriage. He claimed to be the only student of the Rococo pastel artist Maurice-Quentin de La Tour. Just before his death, he made a chalk portrait of a Black man who may be Toussaint Louverture.

Artist: painted a portrait of Marie Antoinette before her marriage
Artist: claimed to be only student of Maurice-Quentin de La Tour
